recent_trades.summary: Adding to UNH on strong 5D momentum (+12%) and price recovering toward 30D highs, increasing from underweight 3.9% to 8%.

Currently underweight at 3.89% relative to other positions; increasing to 8% reflects the improving technical picture.

recent_trades.summary: Selling HD to reduce position count to 10 (currently at 11, exceeding max) and it's the weakest 30D performer at -9.5%.

JPM is up +1.2% today and near its 30-day high at 311.14, showing consistent uptrend from 306 support. Financials have been resilient and JPM is the highest quality name in the sector.

universe.description: Default 20-name universe: mega-cap leaders across all major sectors. Liquid, well-covered, large-cap U.S. equities.
